title: IAP product manifest
description: Single source of truth for App Store Connect + Play Console product configuration. Feed to scripts/iap-build.mjs.

baseCurrency.description: Currency the basePrice values are expressed in. Must have a price-point ladder (USD/EUR/GBP/JPY/KRW).

targetCurrencies.description: Currencies to expand prices into. Omit to expand all known currencies.

fx.description: Optional FX overrides vs USD (e.g. {"KRW": 1370}). Static on purpose — store pricing is set, not live-FX. Revisit quarterly.

id.description: Permanent, global, lowercase reverse-dns product ID. NEVER reuse a deleted ID. Max 100 chars (Play).

refName.description: Internal reference name shown in App Store Connect. Not user-facing.

basePrice.description: Price in baseCurrency. Snapped to the nearest legal price point per currency.

group.description: Subscription group ID. Required for auto_renewable. All tiers of one offering share one group so the OS treats switches as upgrade/downgrade, not new subscriptions.

period.description: ISO-8601 billing period. Required for auto_renewable.

rank.description: Tier rank within the group. 1 = highest. Lower number = higher tier. Controls upgrade (prorated, immediate) vs downgrade (defers to renewal).

upgradesTo.description: IDs in the SAME group with a higher tier (lower rank) this product can upgrade into. Validated by iap-build.mjs.
